name: establish-single-search-index-writer
title: Establish Single Search Index Writer
description: Make IndexingRuntime the sole semantic mutation path and one dedicated writer the owner of shared FTS writes and DDL.
scope: IndexingRuntime store boundary, search-index worker/service ownership, File/App FTS mutation migration, DDL readiness, and checkpoint contract
creator: TalexDreamSoul
notes: Implementation and every acceptance gate are complete. On 2026-07-18, real-profile query-only preflight, correlated copy simulations, no-op scan_progress plan, and isolated packaged maintenance scan passed without modifying the source database. The user authorized the closure work commit and Trellis archive.

meta.nextAction: Archive this completed task and record the session journal after the authorized closure work commit.
